items.q: Does DecisionLens give buy or sell signals?
items.a: No. It is a decision-intelligence platform focused on context, structure, and disciplined interpretation.
Premium layers are separated from the free layer so the product can organize deeper tools and advanced context more clearly.

items.q: Is the Academy a trading course?
items.a: Not in the usual sense. It is a behavioral education layer focused on mindset, context, bias, and discipline.
No. Alerts are designed for session awareness, structural changes, learning reminders, and account-state updates.
Private analytics belong inside Profile and Academy-linked progress areas, not on the main dashboard.
